summary: Classified the ten hydrated open PRs independently. No shared canonical exists for this live inventory shard, no security-sensitive items were detected, and the job disallows merge, fix PRs, post-merge closeout, and low-signal closure. All PRs should remain open for normal maintainer or author follow-up.
